headline: Big Balder Brand: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Big Balder Brand carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 88.39, led by Trey McBride, Rashee Rice, and A.J. Brown. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Chris Godwin at 62.4 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 15, Big Balder Brand traded with DMV Fantasy and acquired Trey McBride while sending George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 1), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 9). Trey McBride is now the verified TE starter at 99.5 C-AVI and 92.0 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 2 draft assets, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks.

On July 8, Big Balder Brand traded with Gringo’s Goblins and acquired Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 15) while sending Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9). Omarion Hampton is now the verified RB starter at 92.1 C-AVI and 88.9 D-AVI; Chris Godwin is now the verified FLEX starter at 62.4 C-AVI and 71.3 D-AVI; A.J. Brown is now the verified WR starter at 94.2 C-AVI and 87.4 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On May 27, Big Balder Brand traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired Rashee Rice, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams while sending D'Andre Swift, Justin Jefferson, Christian Watson. Rashee Rice is now the verified WR starter at 95.5 C-AVI and 85.9 D-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Trey McBride (99.5), Rashee Rice (95.5), and A.J. Brown (94.2).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Chris Godwin is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 62.4. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 13 offensive players, with 5 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 76.65.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 13 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
